basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Attender & Watchman cum Gardener Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India (CBI) has officially announced the Attender / Sub-Staff & Watchman cum Gardener Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification was published on 2026 at Central Bank of India centralbank.bank.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 35 years and hold a minimum of 10th Standard for Attender/Sub-Staff and 8th Standard for Watchman cum Gardener are eligible to apply offline. The offline application process for CBI Attender / Sub-Staff & Watchman Recruitment 2026 must reach the bank by 20-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared

age_limit.details: The age limit for candidates is between 18 years to 35 years.

qualification.details: Attender / Sub-Staff: Minimum 10th Standard passed. Resident of the same State, preferably the same or nearby district / residing at the headquarters of RSETI Center. Watchman cum Gardener: Minimum 8th Standard passed. Ability to read and write the local language is preferred. Resident of the same State, preferably the same or nearby district / residing at the headquarters of RSETI/FLCC Center.

salary_details.details: Attender / Sub-Staff: Rs. 14,000/- per month Watchman cum Gardener: Rs. 12,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: centralbank.bank.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Central Bank of India Attender / Sub-Staff & Watchman cum Gardener posts is 20th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For the Attender / Sub-Staff post, a minimum of 10th Standard passed is required. For the Watchman cum Gardener post, a minimum of 8th Standard passed is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the candidates applying for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates should be between 18 years and 35 years of age to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Attender / Sub-Staff and Watchman cum Gardener posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Attender / Sub-Staff is Rs. 14,000/- per month, and for Watchman cum Gardener, it is Rs. 12,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for these positions?
faq.answer: The job location is Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are generally required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Typically, self-attested copies of photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates are required. Please refer to the official notification for the exact list.
